header.name: Yanai Klugman
header.headline: Systems & Infrastructure Software Engineer | Python, Linux, CI/CD, AI Tooling

data.summary:
Python-focused systems and infrastructure software engineer working across OEM
field integration, CI/CD platforms, release validation, native-library
integration, customer-deployed systems, and AI-assisted developer workflows.
Combines Linux, DevOps automation, and C/C++ systems fundamentals with tools
that shorten release and field-engineering loops.

experience.subtitle: Systems Integration, CI/CD Automation, Edge Deployment
highlights: Owned OEM field-integration work for pre-mass-production vehicle programs, covering validation, configuration, release-readiness evidence, and customer-environment handoff.
Converted ad-hoc field scripts into official Kardome tools for audio capture, calibration, configuration, diagnostics, and CES 2026 demo-vehicle readiness.
Reduced local CI runtime by ~60% and shifted benchmark validation into asynchronous cloud jobs tied to PR checks, status gates, branch protection, and release overrides.
Built Kardome's centralized cloud benchmark platform and developer-facing plugin SDK, standardizing benchmark execution, dataset handoff, scoring, and GitHub integration.
Stabilized Python access to Kardome's native audio library by evolving a direct ctypes wrapper into a versioned Python/C++ SDK using nanobind, schema-driven code generation, and C++ concurrency.
Shaped the local inference and tool-call architecture for a voice-intent service that routes natural-language audio commands into parameterized system actions.

experience.subtitle: C# Internal Reporting Tools, SQL Server
highlights: Delivered C#/.NET reporting tools backed by SQL Server for operations and quality-control workflows.
Reduced recurring report latency by tuning SQL Server queries, indexes, and data access patterns.
Exposed production-line quality metrics and industrial monitoring data through internal administration tools.

experience.subtitle: Data Ingestion, Systems Integration
highlights: Extended ETL pipelines for high-volume investigative datasets in secure client intelligence environments.
Increased search and pipeline throughput by resolving database indexing issues and ingestion bottlenecks.
Unblocked complex record imports by defining schemas and transformation scripts for investigative search indexes.
Held security clearance for client-site engineering work.

projects.name: WinMint (Windows 11 Image Builder)
highlights: Made Windows 11 developer workstation installs repeatable with curated image-builder profiles instead of toggle-heavy debloat scripts or over-minimized ISOs.
Extended setup coverage across x64, Windows on ARM, and Surface-class machines with profile-driven choices, driver handling, first-logon provisioning, and developer environment configuration.
Mapped ownership gaps and communication bottlenecks in a Siemens Digital Industries Software practicum into concrete post-acquisition engineering-handoff recommendations.
Produced a distributed-system architecture that clarified service boundaries, API integration paths, deployment tradeoffs, and service ownership.
Built AWS/Terraform infrastructure exercises covering Docker, Kubernetes, Ansible, and Jenkins workflows.

training.degree: Computer Science and C/C++ Systems Development
highlights: Completed full-time C/C++ systems training through Linux, memory management, data structures, algorithms, networking, multithreading, asynchronous programming, and build-internals projects.
Built low-level C projects around standard-library reimplementation, pointers, memory layout, file I/O, and manual debugging.
Delivered systems exercises using TCP/UDP, producer/consumer, pub/sub, Raspberry Pi, cross-compilation, code review, and regression tests.
